---
title: "Institutional map grid"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
source("../scripts/model_functions.R")

classify_regime <- function(p, c, r, alpha, N, beta) {
  vw_u <- tryCatch(VW_R1_unanimity(r, alpha, p, N, beta), error = function(e) NA)
  vw_m <- tryCatch(VW_R1_majority(r, alpha, p, N, beta), error = function(e) NA)
  if (is.na(vw_u) | is.na(vw_m)) return(NA)
  if (vw_u >= c) return(2)
  else if (vw_m >= c) return(1)
  else return(0)
}

compute_tau_bnd <- function(r, alpha, N, beta, c, rule = "U") {
  vw_fn <- if (rule == "U") VW_R1_unanimity else VW_R1_majority
  lo <- 0.001; hi <- 1
  vw_hi <- tryCatch(vw_fn(r, alpha, hi, N, beta), error = function(e) NA)
  if (is.na(vw_hi) || vw_hi < c) return(NA)
  vw_lo <- tryCatch(vw_fn(r, alpha, lo, N, beta), error = function(e) NA)
  if (is.na(vw_lo)) return(NA)
  if (vw_lo >= c) return(lo)
  for (iter in 1:50) {
    mid <- (lo + hi) / 2
    vw_mid <- tryCatch(vw_fn(r, alpha, mid, N, beta), error = function(e) NA)
    if (is.na(vw_mid)) { hi <- mid; next }
    if (vw_mid >= c) hi <- mid else lo <- mid
  }
  return((lo + hi) / 2)
}

plot_inst_map <- function(r, alpha, N, beta, c_max = NULL) {
  if (is.null(c_max)) {
    vw_max <- tryCatch(VW_R1_majority(r, alpha, 1, N, beta), error = function(e) 0.01)
    c_max <- max(vw_max * 1.3, 0.005)
  }
  ps <- seq(0.005, 0.995, by = 0.01)
  cs <- seq(0.001, c_max, length.out = 80)
  mat <- matrix(NA, length(ps), length(cs))
  for (i in seq_along(ps))
    for (j in seq_along(cs))
      mat[i, j] <- classify_regime(ps[i], cs[j], r, alpha, N, beta)
  cols <- c("gray85", "#E6550DCC", "#3182BDCC")
  image(ps, cs, mat, col = cols, breaks = c(-0.5, 0.5, 1.5, 2.5),
        xlab = "", ylab = "",
        main = bquote(N == .(N) ~ ", " ~ r == .(r)), cex.main = 0.9, las = 1)
  cs_fine <- seq(0.001, c_max, length.out = 80)
  tau_U_c <- sapply(cs_fine, function(cc) compute_tau_bnd(r, alpha, N, beta, cc, "U"))
  tau_M_c <- sapply(cs_fine, function(cc) compute_tau_bnd(r, alpha, N, beta, cc, "M"))
  v <- !is.na(tau_U_c); if (any(v)) lines(tau_U_c[v], cs_fine[v], lwd = 1.5)
  v <- !is.na(tau_M_c); if (any(v)) lines(tau_M_c[v], cs_fine[v], lwd = 1.5, lty = 3)
  phi <- (r*N - beta*(N-1+r)) / (beta*(r-1))
  disc <- phi^2 - 4*(N-2)
  if (disc > 0) {
    mu_s <- (phi - sqrt(disc)) / (2*(N-2))
    if (mu_s > 0 & mu_s < 1) abline(v = mu_s, lty = 2, lwd = 1, col = "black")
  }
}
```

```{r grid, fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
Ns <- c(20, 50, 100, 150)
rs <- c(1.1, 1.3, 1.5, 1.8, 2.0)

par(mfrow = c(length(Ns), length(rs)),
    mar = c(2, 2, 2, 0.5), oma = c(2, 2, 0, 0))

for (i in seq_along(Ns)) {
  for (j in seq_along(rs)) {
    if (0.3 >= 1/rs[j]) { plot.new(); next }
    plot_inst_map(rs[j], 0.3, Ns[i], 0.9, c_max = 0.1)
  }
}
mtext("Prior p", side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 0.5)
mtext("Entry cost c", side = 2, outer = TRUE, line = 0.5)
```
